backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as a placeholder backend with no logic implemented.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented game features (3D environment, player controls, timer, leaderboard, main menu) to their corresponding source files and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON map of all frontend source files to one-line descriptions, serving as a quick reference for the purpose of each file in the project.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS entry file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens used throughout the UI.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell that mounts the React app into a root div and loads the main TypeScript entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component managing top-level screen navigation state between menu, game, leaderboard, and controls views.
frontend/src/components/ControlsScreen.t: Controls reference screen listing all keyboard and mouse inputs with neon-styled key badges, pro tips, and a back-to-menu button.
frontend/src/components/GameScene.tsx: Main game scene component orchestrating the React Three Fiber canvas, physics world, player, platforms, obstacles, timer, particle effects, and post-run dialogs.
frontend/src/components/HUD.tsx: Heads-up display overlay rendering the run timer, finish state indicator, restart/menu buttons, and control hints during gameplay.
frontend/src/components/Leaderboard.tsx: Displays a top-10 leaderboard table with rank icons, player names, times, and dates, highlighting the current player's entry if a `highlightTime` prop is provided.
frontend/src/components/MainMenu.tsx: Renders the main menu screen with a logo, tagline, and navigation buttons (Start Game, Leaderboard, Controls) over an animated 3D background.
frontend/src/components/MenuBackground.t: Renders an animated Three.js canvas background for the main menu, featuring a slowly orbiting camera, course platforms with neon glow, stars, and colored point lights.
Modal dialog shown after a run completes, allowing the player to enter a name (up to 12 characters) to save their time to the leaderboard or skip.
frontend/src/components/Obstacle.tsx: Renders a physics-enabled moving obstacle box using `@react-three/cannon`, animating its position sinusoidally along a specified axis each frame.
frontend/src/components/ParticleEffect.t: Renders a burst particle effect at a given position using Three.js `Points`, simulating gravity and fading particles out over their lifetime.
frontend/src/components/Platform.tsx: Renders a physics-enabled platform box with a dark material and a neon edge glow strip, supporting optional sinusoidal movement along the x or z axis.
frontend/src/components/Player.tsx: A physics-based 3D player component using react-three/cannon that handles movement, jumping, mouse-look camera control, and triggers callbacks for entering start/finish zones and landing/jumping events.
frontend/src/components/Zone.tsx: A semi-transparent, pulsing 3D box component used to visually mark zones (start/finish) with an animated emissive glow effect.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider for ICP, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status via a React context hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Placeholder module indicating no backend queries are needed since all game state is local.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind, imports game fonts (Rajdhani, Share Tech Mono), defines a neon-themed dark color palette using CSS custom properties, and adds neon color utility classes.
frontend/src/lib/courseData.ts: Defines the parkour course layout including platform and obstacle data (positions, sizes, movement parameters) along with start/finish positions and the fall threshold constant.
frontend/src/lib/materials.ts: Exports neon color constants and factory functions for creating Three.js MeshStandardMaterial instances for platforms, edges, obstacles, start zones, and finish zones.
frontend/src/lib/useKeyboardControls.ts: A React hook that tracks WASD/arrow key, spacebar, and shift keyboard state via event listeners and exposes it as a ref for use in game loops.
frontend/src/lib/useLeaderboard.ts: A React hook that manages a localStorage-persisted top-10 leaderboard, providing functions to add entries, get rank, and refresh the list.
frontend/src/lib/useTimer.ts: A React hook implementing a high-precision stopwatch using requestAnimationFrame, with start, stop, and reset controls and a formatted time string output.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that wraps the App component with QueryClientProvider for data fetching and InternetIdentityProvider for authentication.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining a neon/game-themed design system with custom colors (neon-orange, neon-green, neon-pink, neon-blue), fonts (Rajdhani, Share Tech Mono), box shadows, and animation keyframes.
project_state.json: Project state manifest describing a 3D parkour game built with React Three Fiber, listing existing features (environment, controls, timer, leaderboard, main menu, neon theme) and pending new feature requests.
